コレクターのために作られた
// WHAT IS POKISTOCK

Built byCollectors.

For Collectors.

The Pokémon TCG community keeps growing, but the tools haven't kept up. Collectors are forced across multiple platforms, missing stock drops, dealing with unverified sellers and paying over the odds.

PokiStock changes that. One platform bringing together trusted UK vendors, card shows, grading companies and collectors into a single, streamlined hub.

Discovery. Trust. Transparency. Built for the Hobby, Not against it. This is what the UK TCG community deserves.

"Because the UK Pokémon TCG Community deserves better."
— Carly, Founder of PokiStock™

// CORE FEATURES

What You CanDo Now.

01
Vendor Discovery
Explore a growing network of verified UK TCG vendors. Live inventory, grail pieces and stock updates in one feed.
LIVE NOW
02
Card Show Finder
Discover upcoming UK card shows. See which POKISTOCK vendors are attending and browse their stock in advance.
LIVE NOW
03
Wishlist & Alerts
Add grails to your wishlist. Get notified the moment a vendor lists it. Never miss a drop.
LIVE NOW
04
Real-Time Feed
New stock, vendors, shows — surfaces in real time. No searching required.
LIVE NOW
05
In-App Marketplace
Phase 2 brings secure in-app purchasing, direct checkout and end-to-end buyer protection.
COMING SOON
06
Vendor Profiles
Full profiles with inventory, ratings, show history and social links. Know who you're buying from.
LIVE NOW
// ROADMAP

Where WeAre Heading.

// PHASE 01 — LIVE
Foundation
  • Vendor discovery & profiles
  • Real-time activity feed
  • Card show finder
  • Wishlist & alerts
  • iOS & Android apps
  • Community platform
// PHASE 02 — SOON
Marketplace
  • In-app purchasing
  • Secure checkout
  • Payment processing
  • Verified vendor badges
  • Buyer protection
  • Direct vendor messaging
// PHASE 03 — FUTURE
Ecosystem
  • Grading company integration
  • Price tracking & history
  • Community events
  • Creator partnerships
  • Collection management
  • Trade & swap tools
公式パートナーシップ · OFFICIAL PARTNER
// FEATURED PARTNERSHIP

The POKISTOCKFloor.

★ OFFICIAL PARTNER
CARD-É-DIEM · COMMUNITY TCG EXPO

Card-É-Diem
October Show 2026

Saturday, 10 October 2026 · 10:00–16:00
Newbury Racecourse, Berkshire
200+ Vendor Tables · Multi-Floor Expo
🏛️
A Floor Named After Us
Card-É-Diem have officially named a floor at their October show "The POKISTOCK Floor" — a dedicated space celebrating our partnership with the UK TCG community. Come find us there!
// ABOUT THE SHOW

The UK's premier TCG experience returns to the iconic Newbury Racecourse. From Pokémon and Yu-Gi-Oh! to One Piece, Lorcana and Magic: The Gathering — this is the destination for collectors.

Spanning multiple floors with 200+ vendor tables, the Artisan & Indie Collective, the Tattoo Tavern, a brand-new Cosplay Contest, and a supervised Kids Club. Free on-site parking and a train station directly onsite.

"
The secret is out…

Welcome to the POKISTOCK Floor! We are incredibly proud to partner with POKISTOCK. Their app is exactly what this community needed — a space that genuinely supports, connects, and gives every single one of us the safe space we need.

Our community is full of wonderful collectors, brilliant vendors, and amazing stores. Now, thanks to POKISTOCK, they are all just one incredible click away!

Having them on board as our community floor sponsor is a perfect match, and Card-É-Diem couldn't be prouder to partner with this platform. Let's show them some love!
— Card-É-Diem, via Instagram
Buy Show Tickets Show Details & Info Visit Website ↗
